name: acb
description: Inspect and invoke brokered agent capabilities without putting credentials in Codex configuration or context.

interface.shortDescription: Use brokered capabilities without surfacing secrets.
interface.longDescription: Adds value-free guidance for inspecting Agent Capability Broker health and invoking pre-qualified capability commands. Capability-specific skills remain generated from the local manifest.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my declared agent capabilities are ready.
Help me use a pre-qualified brokered capability safely.
